purpose: Target gates for interpreting the local MLE readiness report.

strict_status_meaning.strong: All available engineering gates are strong or passed.
strict_status_meaning.acceptable: No hard failures; some non-critical gates are acceptable.
strict_status_meaning.unideal: Hard gates may pass, but one or more advisory gaps need work before strong claims.
strict_status_meaning.failed: At least one hard gate failed.

poc_demo_status_meaning.ready_with_limitations: Supervised synthetic-data engineering demo is acceptable with disclaimers.
poc_demo_status_meaning.needs_poc_fixes: Fix blocking PoC categories before using the demo as a flagship artifact.
poc_demo_status_meaning.not_ready: A hard gate failed; do not demo as a serious MLE project yet.

next_true_production_steps: Replace local JSON/vector files with Pinecone, pgvector, Qdrant, or another managed vector store.
Move SQLite to PostgreSQL with Alembic migrations.
Move DB-backed local async tasks to Celery/RQ with Redis or RabbitMQ.
Add labeled summary and RAG evaluation datasets.
Calibrate treatment-response probability and address weak subgroup slices.
Add formal threat model and PHI redaction/retention policy enforcement.
Componentize the frontend into React/Next.js views.
